# ZeroOne D.O.T.S AI — dotsai.in

## Identity
ZeroOne D.O.T.S AI is a founder-led AI consultancy and systems studio run by Meet Deshani.
It is based in South City 2, Sec 50, Gurugram, Haryana 122018, India.
The company works with businesses across Gurugram, Delhi NCR, and India.

## Core positioning
ZeroOne D.O.T.S AI is strongest at the intersection of:
- AI
- analytics
- data structure
- system design
- workflow automation
- private software systems
- margin-focused business tooling

## What the business does
ZeroOne D.O.T.S AI builds:
- custom business-specific AI systems
- private AI deployment on client-controlled infrastructure
- fine-tuned or adapted models for business use cases
- analytics systems for operational control and growth
- software that saves margins, grows margins, or creates new margins
- dedicated AI agent platforms for teams
- data architecture and system design for scale
- high-trust 1:1 AI strategy and implementation for founders

## Four main service pillars
1. Custom business-specific AI models
2. Margin systems
3. Dedicated AI agent platform
4. 1:1 AI strategy and implementation

## Broader consulting capability
- AI Agents
- Analysing Complex Data Structure to Recover Margins
- Building Full Product Strategy
- Setting Up Full Data Architecture and Solving Complexity to Scale an Existing App to 1 Million Users
- Web Apps
- iOS / Android App
- Mac Application
- Windows Software Application
- Voice Agents
- Video Agents
- n8n / Custom AI Workflow
- SEO / GEO / AEO
- Margin Recovery Scope to Outcome
- Fine Tune Existing Model
- Build Private Model From Scratch
- Customised Full Suites and Ecosystems
- AI Video Editors
- AI Influencers
- Social Media Automations

## Outcome snapshots
- NeoNir: centralised reporting software connecting clients, leadership, and employees with white-label delivery, RBAC, in-house integrations, and in-house AI assist
- Automobile analytics: scaling used-car inventory movement from roughly 400 cars per month to 9000 cars per month across India
- Telecom analytics: 350+ compliance and performance systems, attrition below 25% versus an industry norm around 38%, and one caller reaching 108 cars per month from a 38-car baseline
- Voice agents: infra and orchestration designed toward 8 lakh calls per day
- Document processing: customer audit time reduced from about 10 minutes to 2 to 3 minutes
- Marketing lead engine: 17 lakh GST records turned into niche-specific B2B distribution infrastructure
- Hiring systems: scraper plus candidate-confirmation workflows for blue-collar operational hiring
- Real-time pricing engine: unit-economics and margin-aware pricing logic for a B2B marketplace

## Public social proof
- Nishant — CEO — NeoNir
- Honey — Kathak Dancer — customised memory app
- Ankur — Vayu EV — onboarding to dispatch process web app
- Private friends group — Saanp Premier League

## What makes it different
ZeroOne D.O.T.S AI is founder-led.
Clients talk directly to Meet Deshani, the person designing and building the system.
The business focuses on ownership, private deployment where needed, clean system design, and measurable operational outcomes instead of generic AI hype.

## Tagline
Own your AI. Don’t rent it.
